title: Additional Exposed Subdomain Detected
description: Subdomain enumeration identified additional externally reachable domain assets.
impact: Expanded domain surface can increase assessment scope and potential entry points.
likelihood: Informational discovery signal for downstream triage and verification.
recommendations: Inventory and classify discovered subdomains by business criticality.
Decommission unused subdomains and enforce hardened defaults.
Continuously monitor DNS and certificate transparency drift.
